zh.Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gavin Blair於1576年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，他的父親Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 11th Lord of Blair29歲，母親Grizel Sempill29歲。他於大約1609年與Isabel Crawford在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1615年6月15日在他的家鄉享年39歲。

nameMeanings.name: Blair
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of numerous places in Scotland called Blair, named with Scottish Gaelic blàr (genitive blàir) ‘plain, field’, especially a battlefield (Irish blár). There were families of this name in the Middle Ages taking their names from any of the places called Blair in Dysart parish Fife, Dalry parish Ayrshire, and Blairgowrie in Perthshire.
Americanized form of French   Belair   and   Blais  .

variants.name: Belair
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Lucien, Aime, Auguste, Aurele, Carmelle, Normand, Raoul, Rolande.

French (also Bélair): habitational name from Belair, Bélair or (Le) Bel-Air, names of several places in various parts of France, meaning literally ‘beautiful place’. Compare Belaire , Bellair , Bellaire , and Blair .

nameMeanings.name: Gavin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin, but uncertain ultimate derivation; it first appears in French sources as Gauvain. The name is borne in the Arthurian romances by one of the knights of the Round Table (more familiar in English versions as Sir Gawain ). It was still in use in the north of England as late as the early 18th century and never died out in Scotland, whence it was reintroduced to England from the early 20th century. It is now very widely used in England, Wales, and elsewhere in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Gawain
meanings: Of Celtic origin, but uncertain ultimate derivation; it first appears in French sources as Gauvain. The name is borne in the Arthurian romances by one of the knights of the Round Table (more familiar in English versions as Sir Gawain ). It was still in use in the north of England as late as the early 18th century and never died out in Scotland, whence it was reintroduced to England from the early 20th century. It is now very widely used in England, Wales, and elsewhere in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Gavin Blair was born in 1576, in Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 11th Lord of Blair, was 29 and his mother, Grizel Sempill, was 29. He married Isabel Crawford about 1609, in Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died on 15 June 1615, in his hometown, at the age of 39.

fr.Blair Castle, Ayrshire, Kingdom of Scotl: Castle, Jackson, Dakota du Sud, États-Unis
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gavin Blair est né en 1576, à Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 11th Lord of Blair, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Grizel Sempill, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Crawford environ 1609, à Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé le 15 juin 1615, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.Blair Castle, Ayrshire, Kingdom of Scotl: Castle, Jackson, South Dakota, Vereinigte Staaten
de.lifeSummary: Als Gavin Blair 1576 in Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 11th Lord of Blair 29 und seine Mutter Grizel Sempill 29. Er hat um 1609 in Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland Isabel Crawford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Juni 1615 im Alter von 39 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

Lui sposato Isabel Crawford circa 1609, nel Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 15 giugno 1615, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 39 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Gavin Blair(이)가 1576년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 11th Lord of Blair(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Grizel Sempill(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1609년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬비른이에서 Isabel Crawford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1615년 6월 15일 그의 고향에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Isabel Crawford aproximadamente 1609, em Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de junho de 1615, em sua cidade natal, com 39 anos.

ru.Blair Castle, Ayrshire, Kingdom of Scotl: кастл, джекксон, Южная Дакота, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gavin Blair родился в 1576 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 11th Lord of Blair было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Grizel Sempill, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Crawford около 1609 г. в местности килбирни, аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер 15 июня 1615 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 39 лет.
